title: Lovely Professional University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Lovely Professional University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lovely Professional University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Lovely Professional University:
Lovely Professional University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University!
